name: Ground Zero
flavorHeadline: Carolina Reaper + Trinidad Moruga Scorpion, charred tomato character
heatDescriptor: Total devastation — for the few who dare
jarImageAlt: Jar of Tomato Warning Ground Zero EF-5 hot sauce with a near-black label
productStory: Ground Zero is not a dare; it is a destination. Carolina Reaper and Trinidad Moruga Scorpion act as the twin engines of this catastrophic blend. A charred tomato base provides the only remaining structure before the storm takes everything else. Total devastation. You were warned.
pairings: Chili con carne for the fearless
Hot wings that needed to be hotter
